queries.sql:
SELECT groupArray(CAST((user, user) AS Tuple(value String, label String))) AS user
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT user FROM system.query_log WHERE user != '' ORDER BY user)

spec.name: Filter · Users
spec.description: Curated Dashboard Filter source (Array(Tuple(value, label)) shape): every distinct user seen in system.query_log, as a searchable single-select. Upgrades any Panel's {user:String} parameter from a plain text box to this dropdown.

queries.sql:
SELECT CAST(map(
  'Select', 'SELECT queries',
  'Insert', 'INSERT queries',
  'Show', 'SHOW / metadata queries',
  'Explain', 'EXPLAIN queries',
  'Describe', 'DESCRIBE queries',
  'KillQuery', 'KILL QUERY commands'
) AS Map(String, String)) AS kind

spec.name: Filter · Query kind
spec.description: Curated Dashboard Filter source (Map(String, String) shape): a fixed map of real query_kind values to human-friendly labels. Upgrades any Panel's {kind:String} parameter to this dropdown — the label is shown, the map's key (the real query_kind) is what's bound to the parameter.

queries.sql:
SELECT groupArray(toString(exception_code)) AS errcode
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT exception_code FROM system.query_log WHERE exception_code != 0 ORDER BY exception_code)

spec.name: Filter · Exception codes
spec.description: Curated Dashboard Filter source (plain Array(T) shape — value and label are the same string): every distinct ClickHouse exception code actually seen in this cluster's query_log. Upgrades any Panel's {errcode:String} parameter to this dropdown.

queries.sql:
SELECT
  count() AS total_queries,
  countIf(exception_code != 0) AS errors,
  round(100 * countIf(exception_code != 0) / count(), 2) AS error_rate_pct,
  round(avg(query_duration_ms), 1) AS avg_duration_ms,
  round(quantile(0.99)(query_duration_ms), 1) AS p99_duration_ms,
  uniqExact(user) AS active_users
FROM system.query_log
WHERE type IN ('QueryFinish', 'ExceptionWhileProcessing') AND query_kind = 'Select'
  AND event_time >= {from:DateTime}
/*[ AND event_time <= {to:DateTime} ]*/
/*[ AND positionCaseInsensitive(query, {search:String}) > 0 ]*/

spec.name: Query log health (KPI)
spec.description: Top-line SELECT-query health for this cluster: volume, error rate, and latency. The time window is a real DateTime range shared by every data Panel: {from:DateTime} is REQUIRED (a Panel stays unfilled until you pick a start), {to:DateTime} is optional (blank means "up to now"). Both render as relative-time fields — type an absolute timestamp or a relative expression like -24h / -7d / now. The optional {search:String} field substring-matches the query text across every Panel too.

spec.name: About this demo
spec.description: Static Text panel explaining the dashboard.

cfg.content:
# Dashboard Filter sources demo

Every favorite below is a Panel, except three **Filter**-role sources (#160) that populate the filter bar above with option lists queried live from `system.query_log` on the **otel** demo cluster.

**Shared filters** — plain, type-detected controls (no Filter source), declared by every data Panel:

- `from` — **required** window start (`DateTime`); type an absolute time or a relative expression like `-24h`, `-7d`, `now`
- `to` — optional window end (`DateTime`); blank means "up to now"
- `search` — optional case-insensitive substring search over the query text (and, in the log panel, the exception message)
- `minDurationMs` — optional minimum query-duration threshold, in ms (slowest-queries panel)

**Curated filters** — sourced from a favorited Filter-role query, one per option shape:

- `user` — real ClickHouse users, from an `Array(Tuple(value, label))` source
- `kind` — friendly query-kind labels, from a `Map(String, String)` source
- `errcode` — exception codes actually seen on this cluster, from a plain `Array(String)` source

Analytical panels are adapted from the Altinity KB page ["Handy queries for system.query_log"](https://kb.altinity.com/altinity-kb-useful-queries/query_log/).

spec.name: Slowest SELECT queries
spec.description: Adapted from the Altinity KB's "Most resource-intensive queries" — the highest-latency completed SELECTs, with duration/memory/rows-read to spot what's actually expensive. Demonstrates the shared time range ({from:DateTime} required, {to:DateTime} optional) plus the CURATED {user:String} dropdown (Filter · Users), the AUTO {minDurationMs:UInt32} numeric threshold, and the universal {search:String} query-text search.

spec.name: Most-selected columns
spec.description: Adapted from the Altinity KB's "Most-selected columns" — which columns have been referenced most often. Demonstrates the CURATED {kind:String} dropdown (Filter · Query kind, Map-shaped) alongside the shared time range ({from:DateTime} required, {to:DateTime} optional) and the universal {search:String} search.

spec.name: Most-used functions
spec.description: Adapted from the Altinity KB's "Most-used functions" — which SQL functions appear most often across executed queries. Uses the shared time range ({from:DateTime} required, {to:DateTime} optional) and the universal {search:String} query-text search, the same fields every other Panel declares.

spec.name: Errors over time
spec.description: Daily count of failed queries (any exception_code != 0). Demonstrates the CURATED {errcode:String} dropdown (Filter · Exception codes, plain Array(T) shape — value and label are identical) alongside the shared time range ({from:DateTime} required, {to:DateTime} optional) and the universal {search:String} search.

queries.sql:
SELECT
  event_time,
  multiIf(exception_code != 0, 'error', query_duration_ms > 1000, 'warn', 'info') AS level,
  if(exception_code != 0, exception, query) AS message,
  user,
  query_kind,
  query_duration_ms,
  formatReadableSize(memory_usage) AS memory
FROM system.query_log
WHERE type IN ('QueryFinish', 'ExceptionWhileProcessing')
  AND query_kind NOT IN ('Insert', 'AsyncInsertFlush')
  AND event_time >= {from:DateTime}
/*[ AND event_time <= {to:DateTime} ]*/
/*[ AND user = {user:String} ]*/
/*[ AND (positionCaseInsensitive(query, {search:String}) > 0 OR positionCaseInsensitive(exception, {search:String}) > 0) ]*/
ORDER BY event_time DESC
LIMIT 300

spec.name: Recent query activity (log)
spec.description: Raw query_log rows as a Logs view, level-colored by outcome (error/slow/info) and excluding the noisy internal Insert/AsyncInsertFlush firehose so the feed reads as actual query activity. Uses the shared time range ({from:DateTime} required, {to:DateTime} optional), the CURATED {user:String} dropdown, and the universal {search:String} search — which here matches both the query text and the exception message.
